d: Co-founder of the German Social Democracy with Wilhelm Liebknecht in 1869. Part of the Reichstag from 1867. Outstandingly argued for the emancipation of women's rights before capitalism could be overthrown.
s: august bebel first international co-founder of the german social democracy with wilhelm liebknecht in 1869. part of the reichstag from 1867. outstandingly argued for the emancipation of women's rights before capitalism could be overthrown. political theory
